message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Remove Bag Effect

actor "Virologist" as Virologist
participant "Bag" as Bag

activate Virologist
activate Bag

Virologist -> Bag: 1 removeEffect(virologist)
Bag -> Bag: 2 getExtraInventorSize()
activate Bag
Bag --> Bag: 3 extraInventorSize
deactivate Bag

Bag -> Virologist: 4 getInventorSize()
activate Virologist
Virologist --> Bag: 5 inventorSize
deactivate Virologist

note over Virologist, Bag: Decreases the inventor size by the **bag's extra inventor size**

Bag -> Virologist: 6 setInventorySize(inventorSize - extraInventorSize)
activate Virologist
Virologist --> Bag: 7
deactivate Virologist

Bag --> Virologist: 8

deactivate Bag
deactivate Virologist

@enduml
```
